action.reasoning: Observation: Current best test accuracy 0.7636 with ConvNeXt Tiny + GCE + Mixup + SWA. Time remaining 1.778h, 25 iterations left. Analysis: Test-time augmentation (10-crop + flip) can boost accuracy by 1-2% without additional training cost. We can leverage the existing best checkpoint (likely swa_epoch_50.pt) and submit a new evaluation with TTA, then if improved, plan further training (e.g., small-loss finetuning or ViT backbone). Decision: Update predict.py with TTA (resize to 256, 5 crops + flips, average logits), run a quick syntax check, then submit eval using swa_epoch_50.pt checkpoint to measure improvement.
